message:
refactor(core): simplify evaluator API by removing external pack parameters

Clean up the core evaluator interface by removing the external_packs
parameter from evaluation functions. External pack loading is being
redesigned and the current implementation was incomplete, causing API
surface bloat without functional benefit.

Changes to cli.rs:
- Remove ExternalPackLoader import and usage in run_hook_command()
- Remove external pack loading and keyword merging in batch processing
- Update evaluate_batch_line() to not pass external_packs parameter
- Replace evaluate_command_with_pack_order_deadline_with_external calls
  with evaluate_command_with_pack_order_deadline_at_path
- Update test_command() similarly with TODO comment for future
- Fix formatting: use multi-line struct destructuring for clarity

Changes to lib.rs:
- Remove deprecated evaluator exports:
  - evaluate_command_with_pack_order_deadline_at_path_with_external
  - evaluate_command_with_pack_order_deadline_with_external
- Update ExternalPackLoader export to new API: ExternalPack,
  parse_pack_file, parse_pack_string
- Clean up update module exports (remove UpdateResult, format_update_result)
- Reorder module declarations alphabetically (logging, normalize, output)

Changes to main.rs:
- Remove ExternalPackLoader import and external pack loading block
- Add TODO comment explaining external pack loading is not yet implemented
- Update evaluator call from _with_external variant to _at_path
- Remove external_packs_slice construction and parameter
- Add inline comment clarifying allow_once_audit parameter

Changes to hook.rs:
- Remove blank line before ruleId field documentation
- Fix format_explanation_text call formatting to single line

This refactoring reduces cognitive load for contributors by having a
simpler, more focused evaluator API. External pack support will be
re-introduced with a cleaner design in a future iteration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
